summary: Basic unit test coverage of core functions with well-organized Pester fixtures and deterministic reference dates. Covers main happy paths (expired/warning/ok statuses, markdown/JSON formatting) and some edge cases (negative DaysUntilExpiry, empty groups). Missing: boundary condition testing (DaysUntilExpiry at 0 and exactly at WarningDays), parameter edge cases (WarningDays=0, null/empty values), error scenarios beyond unsupported format, empty secret lists, script execution mode tests (only dot-source), OutputFile parameter testing, and GitHub Actions workflow validation. Well-structured but would benefit from parametrized tests and DRY fixture helpers. Would catch obvious regressions but miss edge case failures and parameter validation bugs.
